content:
As her banner is coming for the 2nd anniversary, this simple guide will help you learn how she works
https://youtu.be/PLDR8auurQs

embeds.title: Morimens | A Basic Guide to Playing Tawil — 2nd Anniversary Rerun...
embeds.description:
I made this video because it’s her rerun on November 3rd, 9:00 to December 1st, the 2nd anniversary.
So, to those who want to pull for her — good luck! 

Note that I won’t cover her Wheel here — only how her kit works.
This is a quick and easy tips guide.
For a more in-depth explanation, go here : h

thread_title: Video Guide to Rates, Banner Types & Characters for Beginners
